description: You are a privacy engineer at a digital rights organization. A high-risk journalist client has asked you to harden their Tor Browser profile before they travel to a country with aggressive surveillance. Implement the following hardening measures in the running Tor Browser instance: set the Security Level to 'Safest', enable HTTPS-Only Mode for all windows, and configure the browser to never remember history. Additionally, modify the following internal preferences: set 'network.prefetch-next' to false, 'browser.sessionstore.privacy_level' to 2, and 'network.http.speculative-parallel-limit' to 0.
